response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, and deep technical versatility, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing financial risk/credit systems — key requirements for a CTO role.
strengths: Exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven experience with event-driven systems, microservices, and real-time data pipelines
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in diverse domains
concerns: No demonstrable experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
No clear track record of architecting production-grade, model-agnostic multi-agent systems with feedback loops
